prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is E-104 Transformers (dry-type & pad-mount) within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.1 Power Distribution. title: T1 E-104 Code/spec compliance
